articles.title: Following user outcry, AMD reinstates memory encryption in consumer CPUs
articles.content: Critics saw the move as an underhanded way to steer them toward more costly chips.
articles.titleZh: 在用户强烈抗议后， AMD在消费者CPU中恢复内存加密
articles.contentZh: 批评人士认为，此举是将他们引向更昂贵的芯片的卑鄙方式。

articles.title: Microsoft discovers new lightweight backdoor that steals cryptocurrency
articles.content: Crypto Clipper spreads over USB and communicates over Tor.
articles.titleZh: 微软发现窃取加密货币的新型轻量级后门
articles.contentZh: Crypto Clipper通过USB进行传播，并通过Tor进行通信。

articles.title: Apple patches high-severity eavesdropping vulnerability in Beats Studio Buds
articles.content: The vulnerability, disclosed 12 months ago, affects multiple manufacturers.
articles.titleZh: Apple修补了Beats Studio Buds中的高严重性窃听漏洞
articles.contentZh: 该漏洞于12个月前披露，影响多个制造商。

articles.title: Before SpaceX IPO, investors in China secretly acquired stakes
articles.content: One previously unreported SpaceX investor has ties to Chinese military contractors.
articles.titleZh: SpaceX IPO前，中国投资者秘密收购股权
articles.contentZh: 一位此前未被报道的SpaceX投资者与中国军事承包商有联系。

articles.title: Nvidia says its AI data center design runs hotter to use a lot less water
articles.content: Public pushback against data centers has emphasized their water and energy consumption, and now Nvidia is highlighting its claim that the Rubin generation reference design for a fully liquid-cooled data center has "eliminated massive amounts of power usage and pretty much all water usage." Still, it doesn't address all of the concerns around AI data […]
articles.titleZh: 英伟达表示，其人工智能数据中心设计运行更热，耗水量更少
articles.contentZh: 公众对数据中心的抵制强调了它们的水和能源消耗，现在英伟达正在强调其声称，全液冷数据中心的Rubin发电参考设计“消除了大量的电力消耗和几乎所有的用水量。“尽管如此，它并没有解决围绕人工智能数据的所有问题[…]

articles.title: Valve describes just how brutal RAM negotiations are in 2026
articles.content: Valve's Steam Machine finally has a price: a whopping $1,049 for the 512GB configuration or $1,349 for the 2TB version. And those are without bundled controllers, which drive up the cost more. The prices are so high in part because Valve isn't subsidizing the hardware, and the company has already indicated that the component crisis […]
articles.titleZh: Valve描述了2026年RAM谈判的残酷程度
articles.contentZh: Valve的蒸汽机终于有了一个价格： 512GB配置高达1,049美元， 2TB版本高达1,349美元。这些没有捆绑的控制器，这增加了成本。价格如此之高，部分原因是Valve没有补贴硬件，该公司已经表示组件危机[…]
